case_title: ANDRES DOUGLAS VS. GEOFFREY GORDON CERTAIN

docket_entries.description: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT RETURNED = RETURN TO SENDER, NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED, UNABLE TO FORWARD
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY DOUGLAS, ANDRES AS TO DEFENDANT CERTAIN, GEOFFREY GORDON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-25-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-25-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-25-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES UNTIMELY SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DOUGLAS, ANDRES IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CERTAIN, GEOFFREY GORDON STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$41.00) SERVED JUN-04-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CERTAIN, GEOFFREY GORDON
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-25-2015 - JUDGMENT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
